Description:

All Valves are manufactured in strict adherence to internationally recognized standards and specifications, including ANSI/ASME/ISO/NACE and API. In addition to our standard products, we welcome the opportunity to design special Ball Valves and Castings for OEM requirements.

The Flo-Tite valve is the culmination of many years of design and development. Flo-Tite has concentrated its efforts on the refinement of the basic ball valve design. The high quality standard features found in the Flo-Tite valve, separates us from our competitors and maintains our position as an industry leader with a totally advanced design ball valve.
Flo-Tite provides a standard of engineering excellence to the process market with proven success in some of the most hostile conditions known to the industry. Through the efforts of Flo-Tite’s engineers and sales representatives, we have solved many of the industry’s demands for a quality, reliable, efficient, and safe ball valve over the last 20 years. Our valves are implemented in many markets and industries throughout the U.S. and many other countries.  Products selected are subjected to the rigors of a product research and development program. The completion of this process produces a safer, more efficient ball valve product.

Name: CSeal International
Description:
Introducing, CSeal International, the latest addition to the ControlSeal family specialising in the supply, project management and packaging of commodity and control valves.  CSeal International has their Headquarters in the United Arab Emirates, to better serve Control Seal’s global market.  CSeal International will also provide its’ customers with the exceptional service and products for which ControlSeal is known, focussing on products in the commodity and control valve ranges.

CSeal International has a global supply chain and teams based in Netherlands, UAE and India. As such, our new operation will allow customers to procure complete packages from a single supplier with the advantages of a single point of contact for project supply.

Our latest range of products under the ‘CSeal’ brand will initially include the following, as we expand our portfolio:

•	Globe Control Valves
•	Gate, Globe and Check valves
•	Ball Valves
•	Butterfly valves (Centreline, double and triple offset)
•	Plug Valves
•	Instrument Valves 

With our extensive approvals globally (more than 600 approvals with end users), we are well positioned to be on most vendor lists.  In addition, we provide project packaging services with documentation and expediting services beyond our own product scope. 

Finally, CSeal International has the added capability to design and supply bespoke valves to our customers for specialised applications. Our global supply chain and project management gives us the ability to provide valves on short lead times, tailor solutions specific to customer and provide a level of on-site and off-site services that continues to set us apart from other suppliers. 

We look forward to hearing from you soon. For any requirements you might have, we can be contacted at info@cseal.nl.

Leader Valves Limited is a leading valve manufacturing company of India. We are a totally integrated valves manufacturing unit. The company was set- up seven decades ago when India was on the threshold of industrial revolution and there were no good valve manufacturers in the country. It has over the years built up an excellent track record by following the policy of customer satisfaction through continual improvement in Designs, Manufacturing Processes and Marketing Products that are highly Competitive, Safe and Harmless to the Environment.

Leader caters to a broad range of industries. It is known for the largest variety of valves to be produced under one roof. We manufacture valves of Cast & Forged Copper and Ferrous based alloys, sizes ranging from 1/2” all the way upto 48” (1200mm). We have an In-house design facility using sophisticated computer modelling software to develop special valves for critical applications.

Flanges & Fittings: Our extensive portfolio includes cast, forged, and pipe-made products, providing you with versatile solutions for your projects.

INOX-TEK is not just a manufacturer; we're your partner in progress. We're committed to working alongside you to create tailored solutions that drive success in your industry. Join hands with us, and let's embark on a journey of growth and innovation together.

Name: Wenzhou Ouwei Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
Wenzhou Ouwei Technology Co., Ltd., situated in Lishui, Zhejiang, specializes in valve manufacturing and offers a full spectrum of services, encompassing development, manufacturing, installation, and sales. Since its inception, the company has maintained a leading position in the industry through its substantial technical expertise and a commitment to valuing talent, meticulously researching equipment, and consistently enhancing its information base.
The company headquarters spans an area of 65,300m² with a building area of 46,000m². The company currently employs 385 staff members, including 28 engineers, 56 technical experts, 12 senior welders, 106 skilled technicians, 6 professionals in physical and chemical tests, 10 special equipment inspectors, 8 non-destructive testing experts, and 8 after-sales service representatives. The company boasts a comprehensive quality assurance system and advanced testing capabilities.
Since its inception, the company has engaged senior valve experts and incorporated core technologies in the valve sector. Leveraging talent, technology, equipment, information, management, and team spirit, the company has been the first to obtain certifications including IS09001, IS014001, ISO45001, ISO15848, API6D, API607, CE, and TA-Luft. The company has developed a competitive and cost-effective structure that fully leverages its strengths. It introduces international best practices in management and technological innovation, continuously enhancing its overall strength and expanding its market share. Its product range includes over 60 series of valves—including ball valves, butterfly valves, gate valves, and check valves—offering nearly a thousand varieties in various materials and connection types. The product range is extensive, covering a full spectrum of media specifications. Nominal diameters range from DN6 to 2600mm, with pressure levels from 0.1MPa to 32.0MPa and operating temperatures from -196°C to 680°C.
Primary Industry: Metal Valve, Ball, and Roller Manufacturing

Name: Techpak Flow Controls
Description:
Valve Service, Valve Leak Testing ,Valve Pressure Testing and actuation work on valves has always been core of our business.
Onsite valve services including:
•   Valve testing and inspection
•   Preventive maintenance programs
•   Valve lubrication
•   Valve stem packing replacement/adjustment
•   Valve fitting replacement
•   Operator installation
•   Valve troubleshooting
•   Valve parts procurement/management
•   Start-up and commissioning support
•   Valve and system upgrade recommendations
•   Valve/Automation maintenance schedules

Our Inhouse Testing includes:
Testing the pressure integrity and sealing ability of valves is critical for industrial applications. TFC provides standardized valve integrity, fugitive emission, and cryogenic testing to qualify valves based on industry-accepted leak rates for external and internal sealing elements.

FUGITIVE EMISSION TEST FOR ISOLATION VALVES & CONTROL VALVES
TFC provides standard and custom fugitive emission tests for all type of valves from cryogenic temperatures of -196°C to temperatures greater than 426°C

TFC performs testing standards :
⋆ Production test :
ISO 15848-2, Shell SPE 77/312 (carried out at room temperature)
⋆ Type Testing :
ISO 15848-1, API 624, API 641, API 622, TA Luft – VD 2440 (test temperatures: room temperature, elevated and/or reduced temperature)

⋆ Type Approval Testing(TAT)
TFC offers TAT, also called DVT (Design Validation Test) valve testing and certifications as an independent third party.

⋆ High Pressure Testing
TFC offers high pressure gas testing up to 1600 bar gas pressure and 2000 bar hydro pressure.

⋆ Cryogenic and Low Temperature Testing
Valves can be tested at any controlled temperature down to -196°C (boiling-point of liquid nitrogen).

⋆ High Temperature Testing up to 800°C

Please do visit our website  http://www.techpakflowcontrols.com/ for more details of our services. 
We would like to be a long term partner to your company for valve servicing and Testing.

Founded in 1977, Sonu Valves Pvt. Ltd. has grown into one of India’s most trusted names in industrial valves, pipe fittings, flanges, HVAC solutions, fire safety fittings, and water meters. With over four decades of experience, we have consistently delivered quality, reliability, and precision to builders, contractors, and industries across the country.

At Sonu Valves, we believe that every drop matters and every flow deserves control you can trust. Our products are carefully sourced, tested, and certified to meet the highest industry standards, ensuring durability and performance in even the most demanding applications. From plumbing networks to infrastructure projects, HVAC systems, fire-fighting installations, and industrial plants, our solutions cater to diverse sectors with unmatched consistency.

As an authorized distributor and stockist, we bring together some of the most respected brands in the industry including SANT, LEADER, KRANTI, VEESON, LP, VS fittings, DRP, BELANTO, and more. This wide portfolio allows us to serve as a one-stop destination for all valve and fitting requirements, helping clients save both time and cost without compromising on quality.

Our strength lies not only in our extensive inventory but also in our customer-first approach. With a dedicated team and a streamlined supply chain, we ensure timely deliveries across India, transparent pricing, and long-term partnerships built on trust. Over the years, we have built enduring relationships with builders, government departments, contractors, consultants, and industrial enterprises, becoming a preferred partner for projects of every scale.

What sets us apart is our focus on innovation and reliability. We continuously adapt to industry advancements while upholding our legacy of precision engineering, ethical business practices, and uncompromising quality.

Name: volk flowcontrols
Description:
VOLK FLOW CONTROLS, INC. — Headquartered and manufactured in Houston, Texas — is a proven leader in engineered valve and actuator solutions for severe‑service applications. Our reputation is built on best‑in‑class metal‑seatedtechnology, delivering zero‑leakage, long‑life performance where reliability cannot be compromised.
We offer a complete valve portfolio — including metal‑seated ball and butterfly valves, soft‑seated valves, plug, gate, globe, check and control valves — in all sizes, materials and pressure classes, plus the GT (GIANT TORK) family of electric and pneumatic actuators for linear and quarter‑turn automation. Our metal hard‑seal designs are specifically engineered for high temperature, high pressure and abrasive or erosive service, providing bubble‑tight sealing and reduced maintenance in the field.
Every VOLK product is designed, engineered and manufactured by dedicated industry experts and subjected to stringent quality control and testing. Field units are tracked through our database to monitor performance and service life, and customer feedback drives continual improvements. The result: dependable, affordable valve and actuator solutions trusted by power, oil & gas, refining, petrochemical, chemical, mining, marine, metals and aerospace customers around the globe.

Name: Driftless Precision Products
Description:
Precision Manufactured ball valve for heavy commercial use.
Our Ceramic Core Ball Valves have a self-balancing design that requires very low torque to operate. These hermetically-sealed valves are extremely resistant to corrosion, abrasion, and chemicals. This allows our valves to stand up to the toughest fluid control challenges. The ball cores and seats are precisely ground in pair to ensure zero leakage.

Available in various drive styles including manual, pneumatic, and electronic. Our valves can be constructed with a variety of materials to meet the most demanding requirements, such as UPVC, PPO, and Stainless Steel. Connections can be configured for threads, flanges, UPVC and more.

Our ball valves are ideal for a variety of industrial and commercial applications, including; water saving systems, industrial automatic control systems, automatic sewage systems, environmental protection projects, water supply and drainage, food and water treatment, and irrigation systems.

Ceramic Core Ball Valves Feature

Low torque operation
High corrosion, abrasion, and chemical resistance
Precisely fitted ball cores and seats
Various materials and connection options
Lifetime guarantee on ceramic internals

Name: Bray Rite Ltd.
Description:
Bray/Rite wafer combination swing check valves are flow activated and Rite Sized. Bray/Rite inlet ports and disc have been shape optimized to achieve a fully open position at low flow rates (3 ft/s on average). Therefore, the Bray/Rite operates exceptionally well in the flow rates typically found in pipelines containing control valves and lines with varying media flows.

Compare the Bray/Rite to typical full-sized swing check valves-- Due in part to their oversized, heavier discs, these valves only fully open at an average flow rate of 11 ft/s. When activated at a lower flow rate, these valves loose true controllability and do not fully open. A partially open disc creates an obstruction that produces a higher pressure drop and fluttering of the valve disc - disturbing the flow and increasing the chance of water hammer.

Bray/Rite is Rite Sized to eliminate these problems. It has been engineered to accelerate line media through the valve and achieve a virtually unobstructed full opening in low pressure. Rite Sized, combined with the limited movement of internal parts during operation, reduces wear – enhancing the long service life of a Bray/Rite valve.

Name: JEYAKUMAR TECHNOLOGIES PVT LTD.
Description:
Mr V.DURAISWAMY, a lathe operator at PIONEER MILLS,CBE with an urge to have his own business started JAYAKUMAR INDUSTRIES in the year 1979 as proprietorship firm with one lathe.  

After a struggle of several months he established himself with job orders from the reputed LAKSHMI MACHINE WORKS LTD CBE. Steadily the firm had grown itself with orders from in and around coimbatore.

With the entry of Mr. JAYAKUMAR, Son of Duraiswamy in the year 1996 the firm had moved to the next Generation Enterprenership, with 5 milling machines, surface grinding, lathe and Horizontal boring machine,Radial drilling machine providing orders for textile industries, paper mills,Chemical valve Industries and export companies also. 

The main client for export orders was GTN EXPORTS ( INDIA ) LTD Engineering Division which has tieup with Global Giant Valve Manufacturing Company Named FMC TECHNOLIGIES.

As advancement in technologies the firm moved on to computer based machines from 2007. we had purchased 5 machining centers concentrating on production orders for various components for oil and gas companies (petroleum wells). 

The year 2019 was a crucial period for the firm due to the worldwide pandemic situation.  This was the period when the firm planned to move in to new building at POTHIAMPALAYAM, ARASUR. 

With the help from NBFC’s it had completed the construction of building in 60 cents of land with the factory over 8000 sq ft .Now, in the year 2022 the firm had regained its growth with not only adding a imported surface grinding machine but also with export orders from various companies.

Name: Recom Srl
Description:
RECOM progetta, realizza e fornisce innovazione per la tua impresa. Rulli in acciaio, alluminio, carbonio. Rulli rivestiti in gomma e poliuretano. Rivestimenti in sughero, ceramici, in carburo di tungsteno, antiaderenti. E soprattutto un servizio tempestivo, immediato e su misura per te. Perché il tuo tempo è prezioso e noi di RECOM abbiamo una sola mission: far ruotare il tuo mondo e assicurarti la massima produttività.

Noi siamo RECOM SRL ma tutti ci conoscono come RECOM RULLI. Anzi, addirittura RECOMRULLI, una parola sola! 

Perché il nostro core business, come accade spesso a chi fa impresa dedicando una vita a progettare e produrre strumenti meccanici che fanno girare il mondo, è molto più che un "vestito": è un pezzetto della nostra anima. 

Facciamo questo lavoro da più di trent'anni, siamo passati attraverso innumerevoli innovazioni tecnologiche e ne siamo stati protagonisti. Innovazione nella progettazione, innovazione nei processi produttivi, innovazione dei materiali. 

Già, è proprio con l'innovazione che RECOM RULLI fa girare il mondo, il tuo mondo, per offrirti soluzioni costantemente all'avanguardia. Rulli in acciaio, rulli gommati, lavorazioni e rivestimenti speciali, servizi di manutenzione e post vendita. 

Ma soprattutto un valore che non si improvvisa e che fa la differenza: la fessibilità e la tempestività d'intervento. Flessibilità e tempestività nella progettazione, nella produzione, nella riparazione, nella sostituzione. Hai un progetto già fatto? Noi lo realizziamo passo passo. Hai un'esigenza e ti occorre una soluzione? Noi la progettiamo per te, la realizziamo e ti seguiamo passo passo. Hai un obiettivo da raggiungere? Noi ti forniamo gli strumenti più efficienti e ti seguiamo passo passo. 

"Ti seguiamo passo passo" è il minimo comune denominatore. Perché RECOM RULLI fa girare il tuo mondo, ma lo fa su misura per te. Qualunque sia il tuo settore di produzione, qualunque sia la tua esigenza concreta, qualunque sia il tuo obiettivo.

Description:
PR-FECT CASTSTEEL ENGINEERING & VALVES PVT. LTD., is a leading reputed manufacturer of Industrial Valves with more than 2 decades of collective experience in design, development, and manufacturing of Industrial Valves. Working with modern technology and advanced production equipments, we specialize in manufacturing a diverse array of industrial valves capable of handling severe working conditions and perfect for industrial applications. 

Our state-of-the-art facility is fully equipped to manufacture high-quality valves designed for a wide range of industries, including Pipelines, Oil and Gas, Petrochemical, Refineries, Pharmaceuticals, Power Generation, Construction, Water Treatment, and other process sectors.

We adhere to a comprehensive Quality Management System, with our products and processes certified to major international standards such as ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001, API Q1, API 6D, API 600, API 6A, CE-PED, CE-ATEX, etc.

PR-FECT manufactures various types of standard and non-standard/special valves ranging from 1/4 inch to 200 inches nominal diameter, with pressure class ratings from Class 150# upto Class 4500#. The following is a comprehensive list of types of valves we manufacture:
Gate Valves
